summary: Comprehensive testing of Knowledge Source Priority feature. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed - verified Priority selector on FAQ/URL/Document tabs, Priority badges in table, up/down arrows for inline priority changes, and proper sorting by priority (highest first).

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all UI elements and interactions verified

backend_api.faq_with_priority_normal: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/faq with priority=0 saves correctly
backend_api.faq_with_priority_medium: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/faq with priority=1 saves correctly
backend_api.faq_with_priority_high: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/faq with priority=2 saves correctly
backend_api.faq_default_priority: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/faq without priority defaults to 0
backend_api.url_with_priority: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/url with priority field works (SSL skip in test env)
backend_api.get_sources_sorted: PASS - GET /api/knowledge/sources returns sources sorted by priority descending
backend_api.update_priority_medium: PASS - Priority can be updated to 1 (Medium)
backend_api.toggle_still_works: PASS - PATCH /api/knowledge/sources/{id}/toggle still toggles active status
backend_api.existing_sources_priority: PASS - Existing sources (Refund Policy, General Info) have priority field
backend_api.upload_with_priority: PASS - POST /api/knowledge/sources/upload with priority form field works
backend_api.upload_default_priority: PASS - Document upload without priority defaults to 0

frontend_ui.faq_tab_priority_selector: PASS - FAQ tab shows Priority selector with Normal/Medium/High buttons
frontend_ui.url_tab_priority_selector: PASS - URL Scraper tab shows Priority selector
frontend_ui.document_tab_priority_selector: PASS - Upload Document tab shows Priority selector
frontend_ui.priority_column_in_table: PASS - Sources table has Priority column
frontend_ui.priority_badges: PASS - Priority badges show with correct colors (Normal=gray, Medium=yellow, High=red)
frontend_ui.priority_up_down_arrows: PASS - Up/down arrows visible next to priority badges
frontend_ui.priority_up_click: PASS - Clicking up arrow increases priority
frontend_ui.priority_down_click: PASS - Clicking down arrow decreases priority and shows toast 'Priority set to Medium'
frontend_ui.sorted_by_priority: PASS - Table header shows 'Sorted by priority (highest first)'
frontend_ui.list_reorders_on_change: PASS - List re-sorts when priority changes
frontend_ui.add_faq_with_priority: PASS - Adding FAQ with High priority places it at top of list
frontend_ui.toast_notifications: PASS - Toast shows 'FAQ added successfully' and 'Priority set to X'

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (Refund Policy priority=2, General Info priority=1)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Knowledge Source Priority feature fully tested. Priority values: 0=Normal, 1=Medium, 2=High. Sources are sorted by priority descending. Existing sources: Refund Policy (High), General Info (Medium). All CRUD operations with priority work correctly. Frontend shows priority selector on all 3 tabs (FAQ, URL, Document) and priority badges with up/down arrows in the sources table.
